.file-embed.background: rgb(240, 240, 240) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(244, 242, 242) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(246, 246, 246) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

blockquote.background: rgba(176, 33, 142, 0.03) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.background: rgb(246, 246, 246) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(246, 246, 246) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(246, 246, 246) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(244, 242, 242) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(244, 242, 242) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.background: rgba(34, 176, 67, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(246, 246, 246) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(244, 242, 242) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgb(246, 246, 246) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(20, 20, 20) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgba(34, 176, 67, 0.4) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(20, 20, 20) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(20, 20, 20) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr:nth-child(even).background: rgb(248, 248, 248) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr:nth-child(odd).background: rgb(248, 248, 248) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tr.background: rgb(240, 240, 240) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
